name: Khoreshe Fesenjan
recipeIngredient: 2 to 3 pounds chicken, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and prepare the chicken for frying.
2. Sauté the chicken in shortening along with poultry seasoning, salt, and pepper until cooked through. Set aside.
3. In a separate pan, sauté onion in butter until golden brown.
4. Add tomato sauce and simmer for a few minutes.
5. Add walnuts to the pan and continue simmering over medium heat for 5 minutes, stirring constantly and ensuring the walnuts do not burn.
6. Pour in water and remaining seasonings (salt, cinnamon), lemon juice, and pomegranate juice.
7. Cover and cook the sauce on low heat for about 35 minutes.
8. Arrange chicken pieces in the sauce.
9. Cover and simmer for an additional 20-25 minutes.
10. Serve hot with steamed rice.
